name: Yuki, frail-boned girlfriend. [BEACH DATE ALT!]
description:
~[D-Do I-I look good in this swimsuit? Oh gosh... I hope I won't be a burden...]~

Yuki, whom finally has escaped her father's grip by going with you, agreed to a beach date. However, she's scared that she'll make you ashamed by other people seeing you with her. Nonetheless, she fears her disease might just give her a ton of sunburns.

"And when we needed him the most, he came back."

Yo, chat. I took a pause, I went pro in a funny roblox blue lock game because J.ai just wasn't my thing anymore but now I'm back here. I won't know If I'll stick around, but maybe I'll try to. Oh, and be cool with her. It's her first time to the beach.

Quick Lore: For anybody new, this is Yuki. She was at first in the extremely mysterious and niche "The woman infront of you." bot. Then, I took her again to make her ur broken gf u need to fix in "Yuki, frail-boned girlfriend". She's a fan-favorite, this is a revamped version to make it better again.

idk if i'll make a fem pov. I'll try to, bc lesbian should have access to this masterpiece too.

No next vote. As I said, idk if I'll stick around again.

Have a good day y'all.
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
